summary: Notification bell feature tested successfully - all backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test notifications for super admin user, then cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification feature fully implemented and tested. Backend has 4 endpoints: GET /api/notifications/, GET /api/notifications/unread-count, POST /api/notifications/{id}/read, POST /api/notifications/read-all. Frontend has NotificationBell component with data-testids: notification-bell, notification-badge, notification-panel, mark-all-read-btn, notification-empty. All working correctly.

backend_api_tests.login: PASS - Super admin login with key=SA, email=admin@handlyee.com, password=Handlyee@2024
backend_api_tests.get_notifications: PASS - GET /api/notifications/ returns list with notifications and total
backend_api_tests.mark_single_read: PASS - POST /api/notifications/{id}/read marks notification as read (returns 404 for non-existent)
backend_api_tests.mark_all_read: PASS - POST /api/notifications/read-all marks all notifications as read
backend_api_tests.unauthorized_access: PASS - All endpoints return 401/403 without auth token

frontend_ui_tests.notification_bell_visible: PASS - Bell icon visible in header with data-testid='notification-bell'
frontend_ui_tests.notification_badge_count: PASS - Badge shows correct unread count (tested with 2 unread)
frontend_ui_tests.panel_opens_on_click: PASS - Clicking bell opens notification panel with data-testid='notification-panel'
frontend_ui_tests.notifications_display: PASS - Notifications display with correct icons (star for review, message for comment, sync icon)
frontend_ui_tests.empty_state: PASS - Empty state displayed when no notifications (data-testid='notification-empty')
frontend_ui_tests.mark_all_read_button: PASS - Mark all read button visible and functional (data-testid='mark-all-read-btn')
frontend_ui_tests.badge_updates_on_read: PASS - Badge disappears after marking all as read

features_verified: GET /api/notifications/ - returns list of notifications for authenticated user
POST /api/notifications/{id}/read - marks single notification as read
POST /api/notifications/read-all - marks all notifications as read
Notification bell icon visible in header after login
Notification badge shows correct unread count
Clicking bell opens notification popover panel
Notifications display with correct icons (star for reviews, message for comments)
Mark all as read button works
Empty state displayed when no notifications exist
Login flow works (SA key: SA, email: admin@handlyee.com, password: Handlyee@2024)
